candidate_summary: Hereditary parent-weight student init; observation-repetition-expansion practice loop; multi-instrument simultaneous training (kora=summary, balafon=Q&A, ngoni=reasoning); interpretation tax L_improv penalizing rote-copy. Inspired by Mande jeli/griot hereditary apprenticeship.
content_words: mande jeli griot West African oral
hereditary init parent-weight student multi-task distillation

results.name: POCL Progressive Overload Curriculum KD
results.rationale: Progressive curriculum overload overlaps with observation-repetition-expansion practice loop.

results.name: Chain-based Distillation Variable SLMs
results.rationale: Chained variable-size students differ from hereditary parent-weight init.

results.name: Imitation Learning Distillation DAgger DaD
results.rationale: Observation+repetition+guided correction closely parallels DAgger imitation-with-correction.

results.name: AMiD alpha-Mixture Distillation
results.rationale: Mixture weighting differs from role-specialized multi-instrument simultaneous training.

results.name: Delta-KD Behavioral Transformation
results.rationale: Behavioral delta has tangential link to interpretation tax but lacks hereditary init and curriculum.

results.name: Progressive Distillation Implicit Curriculum
results.rationale: Implicit curriculum via progressive distillation overlaps with expansion observation-repetition loop.

results.name: OPD Multi-Domain Teacher Merge
results.rationale: Multi-domain teacher merge analogous to multi-instrument role-specialized training (kora/balafon/ngoni).

decision_rationale: 4/8 prior art hits. POCL + DAgger + Progressive Distillation Implicit + OPD Multi-Domain cover practice-loop + multi-teacher elements. Hereditary parent-weight init + interpretation tax + role-specialized multi-instrument retain some specific framing but the overall mechanism is covered. Verdict: FAIL.
